name: Autologous mitochondrial transplant cerebral ischemia trial remains recruiting
summary: The University of Washington ClinicalTrials.gov record for endovascular autologous mitochondrial transplantation in cerebral ischemia remained recruiting as of the June 3, 2026 review.
significance_note: The linked phase 1 publication supplies safety and feasibility context, but the registry has no posted efficacy results and remains acute-stroke translation rather than aging efficacy evidence.
